title: Policy: Policy applied - Logout - Settings stay locked
scenario: Locked policy settings persist in the Poly Studio Mobile app after user logs out of tenant
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log in to the app with a tenant account that has a policy applied to the device.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Verify that certain settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) are locked/greyed out due to the applied policy.
5. Log out of the tenant account from the app (Account → Log Out).
6. Observe the state of the previously locked settings in Device Settings or Audio Settings.
expected: After logging out of the tenant, the settings that were locked by the policy should become unlocked and editable in the app.
